valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Wed 22 Jul 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Thu 23 Jul 2026
general_synopsis: Developing low moving steadily northeastwards, expected 300 miles northeast of Iceland 992 by midday tomorrow. High 250 miles west of Shannon 1036 dissipating
